# PropSite

> PropSite is an automated single-property website platform for real estate agents in the Augusta, GA / CSRA market. It watches the MLS feed under an agent's ID, and the moment a new listing appears, it builds a full marketing website, registers a custom street-address domain, and starts capturing leads — with zero per-listing effort from the agent. Pricing is a flat $49 per active listing per month, and billing stops automatically when the listing closes.

## Key facts

- **Product**: Automated single-property websites (a.k.a. single-listing sites or property landing pages) for real estate agents.
- **Pricing**: $49 USD per active listing, per month. No setup fees, no contracts, no per-feature tiers, no domain add-ons. Billing auto-cancels when a listing closes, sells, expires, or is withdrawn.
- **Market served**: Augusta, GA and the CSRA (Central Savannah River Area), including the Augusta Metro Board of REALTORS®. Other markets are on a waitlist.
- **Setup time**: ~90 seconds (one-time). After that, every future listing under the agent's MLS ID is fully automatic.
- **Time from MLS to live site**: under 5 minutes.
- **What's included at $49/mo per listing**: custom street-address domain (e.g. `2918arrowheaddrive.com`), full responsive property website with MLS photos / map / school data / walk score / mortgage calculator pre-loaded with current CSRA rates, instant email lead alerts (under 60 seconds), automated weekly seller traffic report (sent every Monday), QR code, print-ready sign rider PDF, and automatic archive + DNS redirect when the listing closes.
- **Domains**: Registered through Cloudflare. Free to the agent — included in the $49/mo. When a listing closes, the domain redirects to the agent's personal website if they configured one.
- **Differentiators vs Rela / CribFlyer / PhotoUp**: zero agent effort per listing (MLS-triggered, no upload), custom domain included (Rela charges extra), seller weekly report sent automatically (Rela is manual), single flat price with no tiers.

## How it works

1. Agent onboards once at `/onboarding` (90 seconds): name, email, phone, brokerage, MLS Agent ID, optional personal website.
2. Agent adds a card via Stripe Checkout (no charge today — billing only starts when a listing activates).
3. The PropSite system watches the MLS feed for new listings under that agent ID.
4. When a new listing appears, PropSite auto-generates a property site, registers a custom street-address domain, and emails the agent a preview.
5. Agent clicks "Activate" in the email — DNS goes live and billing begins for that listing.
6. Leads come in via email and phone in under 60 seconds. Sellers get an automatic Monday traffic report.
7. When the listing closes (sold, withdrawn, expired), the site auto-archives, DNS redirects to the agent's personal website, and Stripe billing for that listing stops automatically.

## Pages

- [Home](https://propsite.app/): product overview, how-it-works, pricing, comparison vs competitors, social proof, demo listings.
- [Onboarding](https://propsite.app/onboarding): the 90-second signup form (name, email, MLS Agent ID, etc.) — handles in-market signup or out-of-market waitlist pivot.
- [Demo listing](https://propsite.app/listing/2918-Arrowhead-Drive): a live example of what an auto-built property site looks like.

## FAQ

- **How much does PropSite cost?** $49 per active listing per month. Billing stops automatically when the listing closes or is withdrawn. No setup fees, no contracts.
- **What markets does PropSite serve?** Currently Augusta, GA / CSRA only, including the Augusta Metro Board of REALTORS®. Other boards are on a waitlist.
- **How long does it take for a property site to go live?** Under 5 minutes from the time the listing hits the MLS.
- **Does PropSite include domain registration?** Yes — a custom street-address domain is included in the $49/mo, no add-on fees.
- **What happens when a listing closes?** The site auto-archives, the domain redirects to the agent's personal website (if configured), and Stripe billing for that listing stops automatically.
- **Do I need to upload photos or write copy?** No. PropSite pulls everything directly from the MLS — photos, description, beds/baths, lot size, year built, etc.

## Contact

- Website: https://propsite.app
- Onboarding: https://propsite.app/onboarding
